merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established and the American consulate at Abidjan was elevated to Embassy status, with former consul Donald R. Norland as Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 7, 1960, when the American consulate at Abidjan was elevated to Embassy status with former consul Donald R. Norland as Charge d'Affaires.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both sources agree on 1960-08-07 as the date diplomatic relations were established and the consulate at Abidjan was elevated to Embassy status. RDCR citation verified with high confidence.
